issues.description: First PowerBoost should target same card as conditional boost. Scope should reference 'that card' after selection, not allow re-selection.
Condition should be 'TrashCount' >= 15, not 'Always'. Text says 'if you have 15 or more cards in your trash'.
Second PowerBoost must target the SAME card selected in first effect, not allow new selection. DSL architecture requires card reference or unified selection logic.
Third effect (Trigger with DrawCard/TrashFromHand) has no basis in card text. Text contains only power boosts; this effect should not exist.

Duration 'EndOfBattle' is correct for battle-scoped effects, but effects array structure doesn't properly chain conditional logic—second boost should only execute if condition met AND card was targeted.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle. Then, if you have 15 or more cards in your trash, that card gains an additional +2000 power during this battle.
